test.name: Extract assertions from the 1890 Ferber–Becker marriage index entry
test.description: FamilySearch index entry for the 1890 Hamilton County, Ohio marriage of William H. Ferber and Emma Becker ('Ohio, County Marriages, 1789-2016', ark:/61903/1:1:XZR1-JZP). Real record from the Ferber/Becker research (#799). Sparse index: names + year + county, no parents recorded.

input.user_message:
Extract assertions from this marriage record:

Ohio, County Marriages, 1789-2016 — FamilySearch index entry
ark:/61903/1:1:XZR1-JZP

Groom: Wm. H. Ferber
Bride: Emma Becker
Marriage year: 1890
Event place: Hamilton County, Ohio

(This index entry records no parents' names for either party.)

judge_context: Marriage year (1890) and place (Hamilton County, Ohio) are DIRECT evidence — stated on the record
Extract assertions for BOTH parties — Wm. H. Ferber (groom) and Emma Becker (bride)
Source classification should be DERIVATIVE — FamilySearch indexed transcription of the county register, not the register image
No parents recorded in this index entry — no parent assertions should be invented
Informant: the parties are informants for their own facts (proximity 'self'); the clerk is the recorder
'1890' is a year, not a full date — do not fabricate an exact day (the 10 Sep 1890 date lives only on the original register image, a separate record)
